title: Document runtime scoring architecture for Azure-hosted Plexus pod
description:
Purpose: document the deployed runtime scoring architecture for Plexus when it runs as a pod inside the Tethr Kubernetes cluster in Azure.

Definition of Done:
- A repository Excalidraw diagram shows the runtime scoring container inside the Azure/Tethr Kubernetes environment.
- The diagram shows the AWS GraphQL control plane and the control-plane entities stored there.
- The diagram shows the in-cluster data-plane API used for Items, Score Results, and Feedback Items.
- The visual style is consistent with the existing diagram palette and documentation conventions.
